articles.title: Monster Hunter Wilds Confirmed for Switch 2
articles.description: Monster Hunter Wilds is officially coming to Nintendo Switch 2, following heavy speculation. A release date will be announced later.
articles.impact: This title boosts the Switch 2's game library.

articles.title: Summer Game Fest 2026 Showcase Highlights
articles.description: The Summer Game Fest 2026 showcased numerous game announcements, including Resident Evil Veronica and Final Fantasy VII Revelation. Fans are buzzing with excitement.
articles.impact: This event sets the stage for upcoming releases.

articles.title: HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered Coming 2027
articles.description: Saber Interactive and IOI are remastering the HITMAN Classic Trilogy with enhanced visuals and new features. The release is set for 2027.
articles.impact: This remaster revitalizes a classic franchise.

articles.title: Capcom's Major Reveals at Summer Game Fest 2026
articles.description: Capcom unveiled several major titles, including Resident Evil Veronica and Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance, during the Summer Game Fest 2026.
articles.impact: Capcom strengthens its position in gaming.

articles.title: Stellar Blade Blood Rain Debuts at Summer Game Fest
articles.description: Shift Up announced Stellar Blade 2, titled Stellar Blade Blood Rain, with a debut trailer at Summer Game Fest 2026. Fans are excited for the sequel.
articles.impact: This sequel builds on a successful franchise.

articles.title: GTA VI Crowds Upcoming Release Calendar
articles.description: The release of Grand Theft Auto VI in November is causing a crowded schedule for upcoming games. Developers are adjusting their timelines accordingly.
articles.impact: GTA VI's launch reshapes the gaming landscape.

articles.title: Final Fantasy VII: Revelation Trailer Released
articles.description: Final Fantasy VII: Revelation, the final installment of the remake trilogy, has been announced for Spring 2027. The first trailer is now available.

articles.title: Street Fighter 6 Year 4 DLC Characters Announced
articles.description: Capcom revealed new DLC characters for Street Fighter 6, including Yasmine, Arjun, Tifa, and Bosch. Fans are eager for the new content.
articles.impact: This DLC expands the game's roster.

articles.title: The Wolf Among Us Remastered Announced
articles.description: Telltale Games announced The Wolf Among Us Remastered for multiple platforms, including PS5 and Xbox Series. Fans can expect a refined experience.
articles.impact: This remaster revives a beloved title.

articles.title: 1666: Amsterdam Revealed by Patrice Désilets
articles.description: Patrice Désilets unveiled his new game, 1666: Amsterdam, during Summer Game Fest 2026. The project has been in development for 16 years.
key_points: New game from Assassin's Creed creator

articles.title: Guild Wars 3 Announced for PC and PS5
articles.description: ArenaNet announced Guild Wars 3 at Summer Game Fest, promising a modern evolution of the MMORPG. Fans are eager for more details.

articles.title: Virtua Fighter Crossroads Set for 2027 Release
articles.description: SEGA announced Virtua Fighter Crossroads, previously known as Virtua Fighter New Project, set to launch in 2027. Fans are looking forward to new gameplay.
articles.impact: This title reinvigorates the classic series.

articles.title: Control Resonant Explores Trauma and Redemption
articles.description: Control Resonant combines supernatural elements with fast-paced melee combat, offering a new experience for fans of the genre. Remedy Entertainment pushes boundaries.
articles.impact: This game expands the narrative possibilities.

articles.title: Crossfire: A Unique PS5 Shooter Experience
articles.description: Crossfire, a new PS5 shooter from ex-Naughty Dog developers, aims to redefine military shooters with a unique approach. Players can expect a fresh take.
articles.impact: This game could redefine shooter expectations.

articles.title: Mighty Cuphead Adventure Announced
articles.description: Studio MDHR revealed Mighty Cuphead Adventure, a new 8-bit action platformer. Fans are excited for this fresh take on the Cuphead franchise.
articles.impact: This title expands the Cuphead universe.
